9:00AM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DEFENDANT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES FOR JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

AKA BAKER, ANDRE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 580 MCALLISTER ST. #418 S.F, CA. 94102 $1,854.00 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,304.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES COSTS.
